ops.body: Correction to the previous comment: the cli-reference.md intro fix IS applied in the working copy (investigation added to the noun list and the --json sentence). It rides in the concurrent session's commit rather than mine — their uncommitted --repo edit shares the same intro hunk, so a hunk-scoped split isn't possible. Only the anchored_uniform_test.go follow-up (adding investigation to the uniformity set) remains open.
